title: tengine.checkpoint.validated v1
description: Readiness-probe verdict after a checkpoint restore. Reserved for the readiness-probe follow-on to the warmup-snapshot-cache surface (epic 9neza, kudbl) — declared in the registry so `shadergen contracts events` shows the full surface, may not yet have an active emitter. Producer: registry handle CHECKPOINT_VALIDATED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is the chain name (e.g. 'svdag').

chain.description: Warmup chain name this verdict belongs to (e.g. 'svdag').

wt.description: Work-type id the verdict applies to.

probe.description: Identifier or description of the readiness probe that produced this verdict.

frames_to_ready.description: Number of frames after restore before the WT was confirmed ready.
